name: Intuit Inc.
description: Intuit Inc. is a global financial technology platform that helps consumers and small businesses prosper. The company's products and services include QuickBooks, TurboTax, Mint, Credit Karma, and Mailchimp, which are designed to simplify tax preparation, personal finance, small business accounting, and marketing. Serving millions of customers worldwide, Intuit leverages technology and data-driven insights to power prosperity and solve the most important financial challenges for individuals, self-employed, and small-to-medium-sized businesses.
